Describe the specific hardware handling and installation steps shown on the workbench.
canonical_answer: At 12s, a person holds a square component above the CPU socket on the black motherboard; at 13s, blue-handled pliers lie near small black screws on the table; at 18s, the motherboard is being installed into the black computer chassis; at 19s, a white cooling fan is visible mounted at the rear exhaust position.

question: Outline the visual sequence from the introductory graphics to the physical hardware installation.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a white computer fan appears next to black braided tubes; at 2s, a white silhouette of a person shrinks while moving left; at 12s, a grey t-shirt wearer holds a component over a motherboard; at 18s, hands install the board into a case with honeycomb mesh.
